title: The Medical Faculty's make-up exam schedule
content:
The Medical Faculty's make-up exam schedule

The Medical Faculty's make-up exam schedule is attached.

In the event of any changes to the dates and times listed in the schedule, updates will be announced separately on our faculty's

official website.

This is an important announcement for all our students.

We wish you success.
